calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-03-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-03-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Tim Barrows.
Attorney Monelle Palencia appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Dorine Roby and Damarius Roby are present.
Attorney Frank M. Scaduto representing the defendants through Limited scope.

The Hon. Judge Ronald E.Quidachay, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of Oct-09-2012 is vacated. (D501)
